recipes.name: Tomato Pasta
recipes.preparation: Boil pasta until al dente. Sauté garlic in olive oil, add chopped tomatoes, and simmer for 10 minutes. Toss with pasta and fresh basil.

recipes.name: Chicken Stir Fry
recipes.preparation: Slice chicken and vegetables. Stir-fry chicken until golden, add peppers and soy sauce, then serve over steamed rice.

recipes.name: Greek Salad
recipes.preparation: Chop tomatoes, cucumber, and onion. Combine with feta and olive oil. Season with oregano and serve chilled.

recipes.name: Scrambled Eggs
recipes.preparation: Whisk eggs with milk and salt. Melt butter in a pan over low heat and gently scramble until creamy.

recipes.name: Pancakes
recipes.preparation: Mix flour, eggs, milk, and sugar into a smooth batter. Cook small ladles in a buttered pan until golden on both sides.

recipes.name: Beef Stew
recipes.preparation: Brown beef cubes, add diced potato, carrot, and onion. Cover with water, simmer for 90 minutes until tender.

recipes.name: Vegetable Soup
recipes.preparation: Sauté onion, garlic, and celery. Add diced carrot, potato, and tomato. Cover with water and simmer for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
recipes.preparation: Butter bread slices, layer cheese between them, and grill in a pan until golden and melted.

recipes.name: Fried Rice
recipes.preparation: Stir-fry garlic and onion, add cooked rice and soy sauce. Push rice aside, scramble eggs in the pan, then mix everything together.

recipes.name: Cheese Omelette
recipes.preparation: Beat eggs with milk. Cook in buttered pan, add grated cheese, fold, and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Pasta Carbonara
recipes.preparation: Cook pasta. Fry bacon with garlic. Mix eggs and parmesan, toss with hot pasta and bacon off the heat to create a creamy sauce.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.preparation: Sauté onion and mushrooms in butter. Add rice gradually with stock, stirring until creamy. Finish with parmesan.

recipes.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.preparation: Cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in the egg, then fold in flour and chocolate chips. Drop spoonfuls onto a tray and bake at 180°C for 12 minutes until golden at the edges.

recipes.name: Classic Pancakes with Honey
recipes.preparation: Whisk flour, milk, eggs, and sugar into a smooth batter. Cook small rounds in a buttered pan until bubbles form, flip, and serve drizzled with honey.

recipes.name: Banana Bread
recipes.preparation: Mash the bananas and mix with melted butter, sugar, and egg. Fold in the flour, pour into a loaf tin, and bake at 175°C for 50 minutes until a skewer comes out clean.

recipes.name: Chocolate Mug Cake
recipes.preparation: Stir flour, sugar, cocoa, milk, and oil together in a large mug until smooth. Microwave on high for about 90 seconds until risen and set, then enjoy warm.

recipes.name: Chicken Tacos
recipes.preparation: Season chicken with cumin and chili. Warm tortillas, fill with chicken, onion, and cilantro. Serve with lime.

recipes.name: Beef Burrito Bowl
recipes.preparation: Cook rice and seasoned beef. Layer with black beans, corn, tomato, and cheese in a bowl.

recipes.name: Guacamole
recipes.preparation: Mash ripe avocados with lime, salt, onion, and tomato. Serve immediately with chips.

recipes.name: Chicken Quesadilla
recipes.preparation: Fill tortillas with chicken and cheese. Pan-fry until golden and cheese melts. Cut into wedges.

recipes.name: Vegetarian Enchiladas
recipes.preparation: Roll tortillas around beans and cheese. Top with tomato sauce and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Fish Tacos with Slaw
recipes.preparation: Pan-sear fish with spices. Serve in warm tortillas with cabbage slaw and lime crema.

recipes.name: Mexican Rice
recipes.preparation: Sauté rice with onion and garlic. Add tomato paste and stock. Simmer until fluffy.

recipes.name: Pico de Gallo
recipes.preparation: Dice tomato, onion, and jalapeño. Mix with lime juice and cilantro. Chill before serving.

recipes.name: Pork Carnitas Tacos
recipes.preparation: Slow-cook pork with orange and spices until tender. Shred and crisp in a hot pan. Serve in tortillas.

recipes.name: Bean and Cheese Nachos
recipes.preparation: Layer tortilla chips with beans and cheese. Bake until melted. Top with jalapeño and salsa.

recipes.name: Shrimp Fajitas
recipes.preparation: Sauté shrimp with bell peppers and onion. Season with cumin and serve with warm tortillas.

recipes.name: Chili con Carne
recipes.preparation: Brown beef with onion and garlic. Add beans, tomatoes, and chili spices. Simmer 45 minutes.

recipes.name: Grilled Chicken Skewers
recipes.preparation: Marinate chicken cubes in lemon, garlic, and olive oil. Thread onto skewers and grill until charred.

recipes.name: BBQ Pulled Pork
recipes.preparation: Rub pork shoulder with spices. Slow-roast until tender, then shred and mix with BBQ sauce.

recipes.name: Grilled Salmon
recipes.preparation: Brush salmon with olive oil, lemon, and dill. Grill skin-side down until flaky.

recipes.name: Beef Burger
recipes.preparation: Form beef patties, season, and grill. Serve on buns with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

recipes.name: Grilled Vegetable Platter
recipes.preparation: Slice zucchini, bell pepper, and eggplant. Brush with olive oil and grill until tender.

recipes.name: Lamb Chops with Rosemary
recipes.preparation: Rub lamb chops with rosemary, garlic, and olive oil. Grill 4 minutes per side for medium.

recipes.name: BBQ Chicken Wings
recipes.preparation: Toss wings in spice rub. Grill or bake until crispy. Glaze with BBQ sauce before serving.

recipes.name: Grilled Halloumi
recipes.preparation: Slice halloumi and grill until golden. Serve with lemon and fresh herbs.

recipes.name: Pork Ribs
recipes.preparation: Season ribs and wrap in foil. Bake low and slow, then finish on the grill with sauce.

recipes.name: Grilled Corn on the Cob
recipes.preparation: Brush corn with butter and grill until lightly charred. Season with salt and lime.

recipes.name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
recipes.preparation: Sauté shrimp in butter with garlic and parsley. Serve with lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Baked Cod with Herbs
recipes.preparation: Place cod fillets in a dish. Top with olive oil, lemon, and herbs. Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes.

recipes.name: Seafood Paella
recipes.preparation: Sauté rice with saffron, then add stock, shrimp, and mussels. Cook until rice is tender.

recipes.name: Tuna Salad Sandwich
recipes.preparation: Mix canned tuna with mayo, celery, and onion. Serve on bread with lettuce.

recipes.name: Lemon Herb Salmon
recipes.preparation: Marinate salmon in lemon, dill, and olive oil. Bake at 190°C for 12 minutes.

recipes.name: Fish and Chips
recipes.preparation: Coat white fish in batter and deep-fry until golden. Serve with crispy potato fries.

recipes.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
recipes.preparation: Stir-fry cooked rice with shrimp, egg, peas, and soy sauce until heated through.

recipes.name: Mussels in White Wine
recipes.preparation: Steam mussels with garlic, shallots, and white wine. Finish with parsley and butter.

recipes.name: Fresh Lemonade
recipes.preparation: Juice lemons and mix with water and sugar. Serve over ice with mint.

recipes.name: Iced Coffee
recipes.preparation: Brew strong coffee and chill. Serve over ice with milk and a touch of sugar.

recipes.name: Berry Smoothie
recipes.preparation: Blend mixed berries with yogurt, banana, and honey until smooth.

recipes.name: Hot Chocolate
recipes.preparation: Heat milk and whisk in cocoa and sugar until frothy. Top with whipped cream.

recipes.name: Mango Lassi
recipes.preparation: Blend mango pulp with yogurt, milk, and a pinch of cardamom. Serve chilled.

recipes.name: Green Smoothie
recipes.preparation: Blend spinach, banana, apple, and water until smooth and bright green.

recipes.name: Penne Arrabbiata
recipes.preparation: Cook penne. Sauté garlic and chili in olive oil, add tomatoes, and toss with pasta.

recipes.name: Lasagna
recipes.preparation: Layer pasta sheets with meat sauce, ricotta, and mozzarella. Bake at 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Pesto Pasta
recipes.preparation: Blend basil, pine nuts, parmesan, and olive oil into pesto. Toss with cooked pasta.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.preparation: Simmer minced beef with tomato, onion, and herbs. Serve over spaghetti.

recipes.name: Mac and Cheese
recipes.preparation: Cook macaroni. Make a cheese sauce with butter, flour, milk, and cheddar. Combine and bake.

recipes.name: Lemon Garlic Pasta
recipes.preparation: Toss cooked spaghetti with olive oil, lemon zest, garlic, and parmesan.

recipes.name: Spinach Ricotta Ravioli
recipes.preparation: Fill pasta with spinach and ricotta. Boil until they float. Serve with butter and sage.

recipes.name: Seafood Linguine
recipes.preparation: Sauté shrimp and garlic. Add white wine and toss with linguine and parsley.

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.preparation: Stir-fry rice noodles with egg, tofu, bean sprouts, and tamarind sauce. Garnish with peanuts.

recipes.name: Chicken Teriyaki
recipes.preparation: Glaze chicken with soy, mirin, and sugar. Pan-fry until sticky. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Vegetable Dumplings
recipes.preparation: Fill wrappers with cabbage and mushroom mix. Steam until translucent. Serve with soy dip.

recipes.name: Beef Pho
recipes.preparation: Simmer beef broth with star anise and ginger. Serve over rice noodles with thin beef slices.

recipes.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
recipes.preparation: Coat pork in batter and fry. Toss with bell pepper and sweet-sour sauce. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Miso Soup
recipes.preparation: Dissolve miso in dashi stock. Add tofu cubes and wakame. Simmer gently without boiling.

recipes.name: Korean Bibimbap
recipes.preparation: Arrange rice with sautéed vegetables, beef, and fried egg. Mix with gochujang before eating.

recipes.name: Spring Rolls
recipes.preparation: Fill rice paper with shrimp, herbs, and vermicelli. Roll tightly and serve with dipping sauce.

recipes.name: Thai Green Curry
recipes.preparation: Simmer chicken in coconut milk with green curry paste and vegetables.

recipes.name: Sushi Rolls
recipes.preparation: Spread rice on nori, add fish and avocado, roll tightly, and slice.

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
recipes.preparation: Toss romaine with parmesan, croutons, and Caesar dressing.

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
recipes.preparation: Layer tomato slices with mozzarella and basil. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic.

recipes.name: Quinoa Salad
recipes.preparation: Mix cooked quinoa with cucumber, tomato, feta, and lemon dressing.

recipes.name: Coleslaw
recipes.preparation: Shred cabbage and carrot. Toss with mayonnaise, vinegar, and sugar. Chill before serving.

recipes.name: Spinach Strawberry Salad
recipes.preparation: Combine spinach, sliced strawberries, and goat cheese. Dress with balsamic.

recipes.name: Tuna Nicoise Salad
recipes.preparation: Arrange lettuce with tuna, boiled egg, green beans, and olives.

recipes.name: Chickpea Salad
recipes.preparation: Mix chickpeas with tomato, cucumber, onion, and lemon-herb dressing.

recipes.name: Avocado Tomato Salad
recipes.preparation: Combine diced avocado and tomato with red onion and lime juice.

recipes.name: French Toast
recipes.preparation: Dip bread in egg and milk mixture. Pan-fry until golden. Serve with maple syrup.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast
recipes.preparation: Toast bread and top with mashed avocado, lemon, and chili flakes.

recipes.name: Overnight Oats
recipes.preparation: Mix oats with milk and yogurt. Refrigerate overnight. Top with berries in the morning.

recipes.name: Shakshuka
recipes.preparation: Simmer tomatoes with peppers and spices. Poach eggs in the sauce and serve with bread.

recipes.name: Breakfast Burrito
recipes.preparation: Scramble eggs with sausage and cheese. Wrap in a warm tortilla.

recipes.name: Granola Bowl
recipes.preparation: Serve granola with yogurt and fresh fruit. Drizzle with honey.

recipes.name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
recipes.preparation: Spread cream cheese on a bagel. Top with smoked salmon, capers, and red onion.

recipes.name: Egg Muffins
recipes.preparation: Whisk eggs with vegetables and cheese. Bake in muffin tins at 180°C for 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Waffles
recipes.preparation: Mix batter and cook in a waffle iron until crisp. Serve with berries and syrup.

recipes.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
recipes.preparation: Layer yogurt with granola and honey. Top with nuts and fresh fruit.

recipes.name: Roast Chicken
recipes.preparation: Rub chicken with herbs and butter. Roast at 200°C until juices run clear.

recipes.name: Shepherd's Pie
recipes.preparation: Top seasoned minced lamb and vegetables with mashed potato. Bake until golden.

recipes.name: Chicken Parmesan
recipes.preparation: Bread chicken cutlets, fry, top with marinara and mozzarella. Bake until bubbly.

recipes.name: Beef Lasagna
recipes.preparation: Layer pasta with rich beef ragù and béchamel. Bake until the top is golden.

recipes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipes.preparation: Fill peppers with rice, beef, and tomato sauce. Bake at 180°C for 35 minutes.

recipes.name: Pork Schnitzel
recipes.preparation: Pound pork thin, bread, and pan-fry until golden. Serve with lemon.

recipes.name: Vegetable Curry
recipes.preparation: Simmer mixed vegetables in coconut milk and curry spices. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Meatballs in Tomato Sauce
recipes.preparation: Simmer beef meatballs in tomato sauce. Serve over pasta or with bread.

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.preparation: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices. Grill, then simmer in creamy tomato sauce.

recipes.name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipes.preparation: Bread and fry eggplant slices. Layer with marinara and cheese, then bake.

recipes.name: Fish Pie
recipes.preparation: Layer white fish and peas in creamy sauce. Top with mashed potato and bake.

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.preparation: Cook seasoned ground beef. Serve in tortillas with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

recipes.name: Ratatouille
recipes.preparation: Stew eggplant, zucchini, tomato, and pepper with herbs until tender.

recipes.name: Honey Garlic Pork
recipes.preparation: Sear pork chops and glaze with honey, soy, and garlic. Serve with steamed rice.

recipes.name: Tomato Basil Soup
recipes.preparation: Simmer tomatoes with onion and garlic. Blend smooth and stir in fresh basil.

recipes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.preparation: Simmer chicken with carrots, celery, and noodles in seasoned broth.

recipes.name: Lentil Soup
recipes.preparation: Cook lentils with onion, carrot, and cumin until soft. Blend partially for texture.

recipes.name: Minestrone
recipes.preparation: Simmer beans, pasta, and seasonal vegetables in tomato broth.

recipes.name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipes.preparation: Sauté mushrooms with onion. Add stock and cream, then blend until silky.

recipes.name: Butternut Squash Soup
recipes.preparation: Roast squash, then blend with onion, stock, and a touch of cream.

recipes.name: French Onion Soup
recipes.preparation: Caramelize onions slowly. Add broth and serve topped with toasted bread and cheese.

recipes.name: Gazpacho
recipes.preparation: Blend ripe tomatoes, cucumber, pepper, and olive oil. Chill and serve cold.

recipes.name: Hummus
recipes.preparation: Blend chickpeas with tahini, lemon, and garlic until smooth. Serve with pita.

recipes.name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipes.preparation: Fill mushroom caps with breadcrumb, garlic, and cheese. Bake until golden.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.preparation: Top toasted bread with diced tomato, basil, and olive oil.

recipes.name: Deviled Eggs
recipes.preparation: Halve boiled eggs and fill with mashed yolk, mayo, and mustard.

recipes.name: Cheese Quesadilla
recipes.preparation: Melt cheese between tortillas in a hot pan. Cut into triangles.

recipes.name: Popcorn
recipes.preparation: Heat oil and pop corn kernels. Season with salt and melted butter.

recipes.name: Caprese Skewers
recipes.preparation: Thread cherry tomatoes, mozzarella balls, and basil onto skewers.

recipes.name: Pita Chips
recipes.preparation: Cut pita into triangles, brush with olive oil, and bake until crisp.

recipes.name: Apple Pie
recipes.preparation: Fill a pastry crust with spiced apple slices. Bake at 190°C until golden.

recipes.name: Tiramisu
recipes.preparation: Layer coffee-soaked ladyfingers with mascarpone cream. Chill and dust with cocoa.

recipes.name: Brownies
recipes.preparation: Melt chocolate with butter, mix with eggs and flour. Bake until fudgy.

recipes.name: Cheesecake
recipes.preparation: Mix cream cheese, sugar, and eggs. Bake on a biscuit base until set. Chill overnight.

recipes.name: Fruit Salad
recipes.preparation: Combine seasonal fruit with a drizzle of honey and mint.

recipes.name: Lemon Bars
recipes.preparation: Bake a shortbread base, pour lemon custard on top, and bake until set.

recipes.name: Rice Pudding
recipes.preparation: Simmer rice with milk, sugar, and vanilla until creamy. Serve warm or chilled.

recipes.name: Chocolate Mousse
recipes.preparation: Whip cream and fold into melted chocolate and egg yolks. Chill until set.

recipes.name: Strawberry Shortcake
recipes.preparation: Layer biscuits with whipped cream and macerated strawberries.

recipes.name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipes.preparation: Roll yeasted dough with cinnamon butter. Bake and glaze with icing.

recipes.name: Panna Cotta
recipes.preparation: Heat cream with sugar and gelatin. Pour into molds and chill until set.

recipes.name: Peach Cobbler
recipes.preparation: Top sliced peaches with a biscuit topping. Bake until bubbling and golden.
